candidate_targets: Current cigarette smoking; Current electronic cigarette use
risk: Current/e-cig/tobacco overlap.
recommended_test_queries: "smoking"; "vaping"; "e-cigarettes"; "tobacco"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: vape/e-cig -> e-cig topic; cigarette/smoking -> cigarette topic; tobacco generic may need clarification.

candidate_targets: Adult Regularly had feelings of depression; Adult Regularly had feelings of worry, nervousness, or anxiety; Adult Taking prescription medication for depression; Adult Taking prescription medication for anxiety; Adult Counseled by mental health professional; Adult Did not get needed mental health care due to cost; Child Daily feelings of worry/nervousness/anxiety; Child Receive services for mental health problems
risk: Mental health terms overlap by symptom, medication, counseling, care access, and child services.
recommended_test_queries: "anxiety"; "depression"; "mental health care"; "therapy"; "anxiety medicine"; "mental health services for kids"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: symptom terms -> feelings topic; medication terms -> medication topic; counseling/therapy -> counseled; cost/needed care -> access topic; child services -> services topic.

candidate_targets: Adult/child Disability status (composite); adult/child Difficulty status (composite); adult individual difficulty topics hearing/seeing/etc.
risk: Disability and functioning difficulty are not interchangeable.
recommended_test_queries: "disabled adults"; "difficulty walking"; "functioning difficulty"; "hearing difficulty"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: specific difficulty -> individual difficulty where adult; composite difficulty -> Difficulty status; disability -> Disability status.

candidate_targets: Doctor visit; Hospital emergency department visit; Urgent care center visit; Retail health clinic visit; Urgent care center or retail health clinic visit; child two-or-more variants
risk: Care setting visit terms overlap heavily.
recommended_test_queries: "doctor visit"; "ER visit"; "urgent care"; "retail clinic"; "urgent or retail"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: setting-specific words should win; combined phrase should use combined topic only.

ambiguous_user_terms: usual place of care vs doctor visit
candidate_targets: Has a usual place of care; Doctor visit
risk: Care access vs utilization may both contain care/doctor.
recommended_test_queries: "usual place of care"; "regular source of care"; "doctor visit"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: usual/regular source/place -> usual place; visit -> doctor visit.

candidate_targets: Delayed getting medical care due to cost; Did not get needed medical care due to cost; Did not get needed mental health care due to cost; Did not take medication as prescribed to save money
risk: Cost/affordability terms can map to delayed care, unmet need, mental health care, or meds.
recommended_test_queries: "delayed care due to cost"; "could not afford care"; "skipped medicine to save money"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: delayed vs did not get vs medication vs mental health must be separated.

candidate_targets: Uninsured at time of interview; Uninsured part past year; Uninsured > one year; Private coverage; Public coverage; Exchange-based coverage; health insurance subgroup labels
risk: Insurance terms can be topic or subgroup; age-qualified insurance group conflicts.
recommended_test_queries: "uninsured adults"; "flu shot among uninsured adults"; "private insurance"; "Medicare adults 65+"; "nonelderly Medicaid"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: If insurance term is main topic -> insurance topic; if another health topic is present -> insurance subgroup; 65+/under65 terms choose age-qualified grouping.

candidate_targets: Fair or poor health status; Wellness visit; Well child check-up
risk: Wellness/well child/health status may overlap.
recommended_test_queries: "fair or poor health"; "wellness visit"; "well child check"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: exact phrase wins.

candidate_targets: Ever having ADHD; Ever having learning disability; Receiving special education or early intervention; Receive services for mental health problems
risk: Child developmental/education/service terms overlap.
recommended_test_queries: "ADHD"; "learning disability"; "special education"; "early intervention"; "mental health services"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: condition vs service terms should be separated.

candidate_targets: Missing 11+ school days due to illness/injury; fair/poor health; urgent/ER visits
risk: Illness/injury terms can drift to utilization.
recommended_test_queries: "missed school"; "school absences"; "injury"
expected_deconfliction_behavior: school absence words -> missing school days topic.
